code:
import io
import string

let line = io.read_to_end()
let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut total = 0
mut i = 0
mut stop = false
while i < parts.len() and not stop
  match parts.get(i)
  when Some(p)
    match string.parse_int(p)
    when Some(n)
      if total + n > 100
        stop = true
      else
        total = total + n
      end
    when None
      stop = true
    end
  when None
    stop = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("total=#{total}")
